nasb.text: Upon a high and lofty mountain You have made your bed. You also went up there to offer sacrifice.

esv.text: On a high and lofty mountain you have set your bed, and there you went up to offer sacrifice.

cnv.text: 你在高高的山上安設你的床榻， 又上到那裡去獻祭。

ccb.text: 你们在高山上淫乱、献祭，

csbs.text: 你在高大的山上安设自己的床， 也上到那里献上祭物。
